title: Sliding window rate limiter per client

difficulty.rationale: Requires a true rolling-window algorithm (per-client timestamp tracking with age-out) rather than a fixed calendar window, plus correct Retry-After math and RateLimit header bookkeeping under burst and partial-decay conditions.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: Five requests within a rolling window succeed and the sixth returns 429.
The window slides so burst requests stay blocked until the oldest ages out.
Allowed responses carry X-RateLimit-Limit and X-RateLimit-Remaining headers.
429 responses carry an integer Retry-After of at least one second.
must_not: Reset the limit on a fixed calendar boundary while older hits are still in window.
Share state across different client ids.
Return plain text or HTML for API responses.
edge_cases: After the window fully elapses the client is allowed again.
X-RateLimit-Remaining decrements with each allowed request.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
